geopolitics_summary: Irish EU presidency begins amid French political uncertainty; Iran rejects Strait of Hormuz security plan; ETS reform pivotal for EU industrial competitiveness.

themes.headline: Ireland tackles EU ETS reform amid competing country demands
themes.why_it_matters: EUA price trajectory depends on ETS reform outcome. Some states want to weaken the system; others defend it. Irish presidency outcome over coming months will set EU carbon compliance costs and cap-and-trade stringency.

themes.headline: France heat wave (∼1,000 deaths) pressures industrial policy and demand
themes.why_it_matters: Record heat drives peak power demand; strains grid and hospitals. French government faces no-confidence vote, creating policy uncertainty. Potential nuclear outages or demand-side measures; upward pressure on DA/Cal+1 French power spreads.

themes.headline: Russian refinery strikes force Putin to import gasoline; fuel reserves depleted
themes.why_it_matters: Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian fuel production reduce Russian export capacity and reserves. Lower Russian crude and fuel exports to global market can ease crude/product prices; indirect downward pressure on gas economics via lower oil-linked contract indexing.

themes.headline: Iran rejects France-UK Strait of Hormuz security mission plan
themes.why_it_matters: Rejection signals friction on global oil/LNG transit security. If Strait tensions escalate, LNG shipping delays and route costs rise, pushing TTF up via supply-risk premium. Indirect but material for EU gas curve.

themes.headline: UAE exit from OPEC+ shifts crude production share and geopolitical balance
themes.why_it_matters: OPEC+ cohesion loss; crude supply dynamics may shift. Lower crude/oil prices weaken oil-linked gas contract economics in contracts tied to Brent. Indirect downward pressure on European gas forward curve.

watchlist: Irish presidency ETS reform negotiations (summer 2026); outcome flags EUA cap/price.
French government stability and nuclear/demand policy post-heat wave (days).
Ukraine-Russia fuel supply flows and sanctions impact on global oil arb.
Strait of Hormuz tensions; monitor LNG shipping cost and route disruption risk.
